entity.summary: United Kingdom-origin crypto company founded in 2011 that launched the Blockchain.com Exchange product in July 2019 and continues operating it alongside wallet services.
entity.notes: HEI records July 2019 as the exchange-product launch month rather than the wider company's 2011 founding date. A specific exchange profile places the product in 2019, and official exchange legal material was active by July 30, 2019. Blockchain.io remains a separate unconsumed candidate.

events.title: Blockchain.com Exchange launched
events.description: Blockchain.com launched its dedicated cryptocurrency exchange product in July 2019.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker based on an independent exchange profile and contemporaneous official exchange legal material; the exact public launch day is not asserted.

events.title: Blockchain.com received a Singapore Major Payment Institution licence
events.description: The Monetary Authority of Singapore granted Blockchain.com Singapore a Major Payment Institution licence for regulated digital payment token services.
events.notes: The licence applies to the Singapore operating entity and does not replace the wider company's United Kingdom origin.

evidence.title: Blockchain.com British company history
evidence.notes: Official company post states that Blockchain.com began in York and has its global headquarters in London.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Blockchain.com
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Blockchain.com Exchange identity and 2019 establishment year.

evidence.title: CCXT reference for Blockchain.com
evidence.notes: Independent exchange-library adapter corroborates the Blockchain.com trading API identity.

evidence.title: Blockchain.com Exchange cookies policy
evidence.notes: Official exchange legal page was in force on July 30, 2019, providing contemporaneous primary evidence that the exchange product was operating in the launch month.

evidence.title: Blockchain.com Exchange features
evidence.notes: Official product page corroborates the continuing exchange service.

evidence.title: Blockchain.com receives Singapore Major Payment Institution licence
evidence.notes: Official announcement states that the licence was granted on August 1, 2023.

evidence.title: Blockchain.com Singapore MAS directory record
evidence.notes: MAS directory identifies Blockchain.com Singapore as a Major Payment Institution.
